Package index

Package overview

Top-level entry point and shared documentation.

olympicAthletes olympicAthletes-package
olympicAthletes: Olympic Athlete Event Data, Athens 1896 to Milano-Cortina 2026

Athlete-event data

The headline long-format dataset — one row per (athlete, Games, event) across every modern Olympic Games from 1896 to 2026.

olympic_athletes
Olympic athlete-event participations, 1896-2026

Medal tables

Verified per-team-event medal totals for the five new editions (PyeongChang 2018 through Milano-Cortina 2026).

medal_table
Verified medal tables for the 2018-2026 editions

Edition metadata

Host city, dates, participant counts, and discipline counts for each of the new editions added on top of the rgriff23 source.

editions
Edition-level metadata for the five new Games (2018-2026)
